codeReview.summary: The feature expands `builtin_agents()` to 28 built-ins, corrects WorkBuddy to `~/.workbuddy/skills-marketplace/skills`, adds AutoClaw as a separate `autoclaw` entry, and backs the changes with regression tests for the special-case directories and agent counts. I did not find a correctness gap against VAL-PEXP-001 through VAL-PEXP-003 in the reviewed code or current source state.

summary: Pass. Commit `058dc5b` correctly registers the expanded platform set and preserves the WorkBuddy/AutoClaw edge cases with regression coverage.
